mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEM_JOIN_INFO ( user_id, user_pw, user_name, nickname, email_id, email_addr, birth_date, gender_cd, reg_ip, acct_sts_cd ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{userPw}, #{userName}, #{nickname}, #{emailId}, #{emailAddr}, #{birthDate}, #{genderCd}, #{regIp}, 1 )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEM_JOIN_INFO WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEM_LOGIN_HIST ( member_no, user_id, login_typ_cd, login_rslt_cd, fail_rsn_cd, login_ip, session_id, user_agent ) VALUES ( #{memberNo, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId}, #{loginTypCd}, #{loginRsltCd}, #{failRsnCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginIp}, #{sessionId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userAgent, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
